0.text: Ground-glass opacities in the peripheral subpleural areas of the lower lobes of both lungs

1.text: Focal consolidations in the peripheral subpleural areas of the lower lobes of both lungs

2.text: Nodular ground-glass opacities in the middle lobe of the right lung

3.text: Ground-glass opacities in the basal segments of both lower lobes

4.text: Nodular consolidations in the basal segments of both lower lobes
